preconditions: User is not authenticated in the application session.
Browser cache and session data are cleared or a fresh guest session is used.

testCases.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state from direct URL navigation
steps: Launch the application in a new browser session.
Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Wait for the SPA Home page to finish loading.
testCases.expectedResult: The browser remains on the URL http://localhost/washtabui/home, the Home page loads without authentication prompts or application errors, and the guest-state controls are displayed in enabled state.

testCases.title: Verify guest-state controls and guest-accessible feature buttons are visible and enabled on Home page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Observe the Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, Home button, Customer signup button, Clean survey button, and Site survey button.
Attempt to focus and click each control once.
testCases.expectedResult: All approved guest-state controls and guest-accessible feature buttons are visible, enabled, keyboard focusable, and clickable without disabled styling, blocked interaction, or client-side errors.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button opens the Login page from guest Home state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Person/Profile button.
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page or Login view opens successfully, the Home guest-state view is replaced by the authentication entry screen, and no authenticated user controls are displayed.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button navigates to the customer-search page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Customer signup button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates away from the Home guest-state view and displays the customer-search page without browser errors, blank content, or blocked access.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button navigates to the vehicle-survey page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Clean survey button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates away from the Home guest-state view and displays the vehicle-survey page without rendering failures or unauthorized access messaging.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button navigates to the survey page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Site survey button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates away from the Home guest-state view and displays the survey page successfully without application errors or blocked guest access.

testCases.title: Verify Home button returns the user to Home page after navigating to Customer signup
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Customer signup button.
After the customer-search page loads, click the Home button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state and displays the Person/Profile button, Home button, and guest-accessible feature buttons in enabled state.

testCases.title: Verify Back button returns the user to Home page after navigating to Clean survey
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Clean survey button.
After the vehicle-survey page loads, click the Back button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state and the shared Home controls and guest-accessible feature buttons are displayed again in enabled state.

testCases.title: Verify Home button keeps the user on the Home page when already in guest Home state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Home button while remaining on the Home page.
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page remains loaded in guest state, no duplicate page content or overlay appears, and the page does not navigate away or reload into an invalid state.

testCases.title: Verify Back button behavior from initial guest Home page load
steps: Launch a fresh browser session.
Directly navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Click the Back button from the Home page shell.
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles the Back button interaction without crashing, displaying script errors, freezing the SPA, or exposing unauthorized authenticated content.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button is visible and interactive in guest Home state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Locate the Notification button.
Click the Notification button once.
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible and enabled in guest state and accepts the click interaction without causing application crashes, visible error messages, or broken page rendering.

testCases.title: Verify guest-accessible feature buttons remain enabled after returning to Home page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Navigate to the customer-search page using Customer signup.
Return to Home using the Home button.
Observe the Customer signup, Clean survey, and Site survey buttons.
testCases.expectedResult: Customer signup, Clean survey, and Site survey buttons remain visible, enabled, and clickable after returning to the Home page from another guest-accessible page.
